visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young Asian woman with her hair in a bun, wearing a white sleeveless top with orange sleeves and a brown crossbody bag, stands in a brightly lit supermarket aisle filled with bento boxes. She smiles and looks at the camera while gesturing toward the food displays. (2) A close-up shot focuses on several plastic trays of fried yakisoba noodles arranged on a wooden shelf, each adorned with price labels and prominent yellow and red discount stickers. (3) The woman holds a triangular salmon onigiri wrapped in plastic, pointing to the label while standing in front of a refrigerated shelf containing other rice balls and sandwiches. (4) A medium shot shows the woman examining a large tray of inari sushi; the background reveals a clean, modern supermarket environment with wooden accents and descriptive price signs hanging above. (5) The camera pans across a shelf of instant udon noodle bowls in aluminum foil containers, showing the variety of options available under the warm indoor supermarket lighting. (6) The woman holds up a clear plastic container of chicken skewers (yakitori), looking at them with a surprised and happy expression. (7) A close-up view of a hand holding a bento box containing tempura fried shrimp and vegetables, highlighting the texture of the breading and the discount sticker on the lid. (8) The woman stands in a wide supermarket aisle, looking directly at the camera and speaking while gesturing with her hands; shoppers with carts are visible in the blurred background. (9) A close-up shot of a large pizza inside a red cardboard box on a display shelf, with a hand pointing at the different toppings across the four quadrants. (10) A supermarket staff member wearing a white mask and uniform is seen in the background applying discount stickers to various prepared food items on a central display table. (11) The woman holds a small bento box with a '100 yen' sticker, smiling as she presents it to the camera. (12) A young Asian man wearing a white shirt with black floral patterns and a white beanie appears, holding a bento box and speaking energetically to the camera. (13) The man holds a large, premium tray of marbled wagyu beef in the meat section, looking hopeful before his expression shifts to one of comedic disappointment as he discusses the lack of a discount.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Variety]: 撿便宜大師教大家. [Logo]: H HABABY. (2) [Subtitle]: 在這個日本超市打烊前. (3) [Subtitle]: 趕快來撿便宜啦. (4) [Subtitle]: 它都會半價!!. (5) [Subtitle]: 超大碗的炒麵. (6) [Subtitle]: 台幣50元. (7) [Subtitle]: 難怪那麼多人在搶購. (8) [Subtitle]: 哇真的不得了. [Variety]: 北海道鮭魚!!. (9) [Subtitle]: 台幣10元. (10) [Subtitle]: 整盒的豆皮壽司. (11) [Subtitle]: 40塊台幣那麼多個. (12) [Variety]: 9人壽司. [Subtitle]: 9個149(日幣). visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female creator, 1 male co-creator, approximately 3 store staff, and at least 9 other shoppers in the background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The primary female character is a young woman with dark hair in a top bun, wearing a white tank top over orange long sleeves and a brown crossbody bag. The male co-creator is a young man wearing a white shirt with black patterns and a white knit beanie.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The background consists of a modern Japanese supermarket with wooden shelving, refrigerated display cases, and various overhead signs with prices and product descriptions. Halloween decorations like pumpkin stickers are visible on some shelves.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-energy male narrator begins speaking in Mandarin with a bright, enthusiastic tone, set against a medium-tempo acoustic guitar BGM; the background noise floor is a low-level supermarket hum. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect emphasizes the narrator's excitement as he introduces the supermarket discount concept. (3) The female creator's voice enters with a high-pitched, cheerful intonation, accompanying the sound of rustling plastic packaging as she picks up a bento. (4) A 'ding' SFX sounds, followed by the male narrator rapidly listing prices, with his voice showing high pitch variability. (5) Another 'ding' SFX marks a transition to a new food item; the BGM remains steady and upbeat throughout the narration. (6) A 'pop' SFX occurs as variety-show style text appears, synchronized with a rise in the male voice's arousal level. (7) Short bursts of 'ding' SFX continue as each new discounted item is showcased, with the voices maintaining a friendly, comedic rapport. (8) The narrator's speech rate increases while describing the variety of sushi, overlapping with faint background murmurs from other shoppers. (9) A humorous 'cartoon-style' sound effect punctuates a joke made by the male narrator, followed by brief shared laughter between the speakers. (10) The female voice delivers a final enthusiastic recommendation, concluded by a 'ding' SFX and the continuation of the acoustic guitar track into the fade-out.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a practical travel guide and lifestyle vlog, aiming to educate viewers on how to purchase high-quality prepared foods at significant discounts in Japanese supermarkets late at night. By showcasing a variety of items and their prices, the creators demonstrate the value and fun of 'discount hunting' during a trip.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video features a generic supermarket experience and mentions various food items without focusing on a specific brand promotion.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-energy, social-media native editing style with dense text overlays and sound effects to maintain viewer engagement while providing travel tips.
